description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence and set within a rectangular plot of grass. The structure features a flat roof with multiple skylights and a series of tall, narrow windows along its length. The front of the bungalow has a small porch area with a wooden deck, and a paved driveway leads to a parking space adjacent to the building, where a blue car is parked. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored wood, giving the house a contemporary appearance. The property is bordered by a stone pathway and a blacktop road at the entrance. The overall layout is clean and minimalistic, emphasizing open outdoor space and functional design.
description: A modern, single-story wooden bungalow with a flat roof, skylights, and a fenced grassy yard, featuring a driveway and a small porch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the bungalow, tall windows, wooden fence, and grassy yard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the porch, driveway, blue car, and main entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more windows visible, driveway, and the car at the end of the property.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, fenced yard, and the stone pathway leading to the road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with tall, narrow side windows
